title: monarda humilis
intro: Monarda humilis, also known as dwarf beebalm or low beebalm, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, the leaves and flowers of Monarda humilis have been used in herbal medicine for their antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe wounds, reduce pain and fever, and combat infections. The plant's health benefits include relieving digestive issues, such as nausea and indigestion, as well as its use as a diuretic to help with urinary issues. Monarda humilis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and its essential oil can be used in aromatherapy or as a topical application to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
